title: Blue Canyon Bathroom Mantel Hall Round Square Cosmetic Shaving Mounted Mirror Frosted (Sqaure Plain 40cm x 40cm)
description: Product Description Blue Canyon Square Wall Mirror is made of high quality glass. It provides you with a full range of clear and real images. Supplies you immediate feedback on everything from your makeup to your clothes. So that you can go out exquisitely. Whether you use by yourself or give to your family and friends as a gift, it's a perfect choice. Easy to install. Measures 40 cm length by 40 cm width. Safety Warning Attention: This mirror is fragile and can break. If it breaks, pay attention to sharp edges. Follow the assembly instructions to ensure safety.
